one_time_items.description: Income tax benefit from U.S. Treasury Notice 2026-7 regarding Corporate Alternative Minimum Tax treatment of previously capitalized R&D costs, partially offsetting the Q3 2025 One Big Beautiful Bill Act charge

evidence_phrases: We had a milestone quarter with strong momentum across our apps
We're on track to deliver personal superintelligence to billions of people
warning_phrases: we continue to monitor active legal and regulatory matters, including headwinds in the EU and the U.S. that could significantly impact our business and financial results
which may ultimately result in a material loss
qualitative_signals.guidance_color: Q2 2026 revenue $58-61 billion; FY 2026 expenses $162-169 billion; FY 2026 CapEx $125-145 billion (increased from prior $115-135 billion)
qualitative_signals.ceo_quote_primary: We had a milestone quarter with strong momentum across our apps and the release of our first model from Meta Superintelligence Labs,
qualitative_signals.cfo_quote_primary: We expect second quarter 2026 total revenue to be in the range of $58-61 billion.

source_quotes.results_actual.yoy_revenue_growth_pct: Revenue was $56.31 billion, an increase of 33% year-over-year
source_quotes.guidance_next_quarter.revenue_low_b: We expect second quarter 2026 total revenue to be in the range of $58-61 billion
source_quotes.guidance_next_quarter.revenue_high_b: We expect second quarter 2026 total revenue to be in the range of $58-61 billion
source_quotes.guidance_full_year.capex_guidance_b: We anticipate 2026 capital expenditures... to be in the range of $125-145 billion
